headline: Moody’s (MCO) Is One of Warren Buffett’s Longest-Held Holdings; See Why
summary: Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) is among the best Warren Buffett stocks. Buffett added Moody’s Corporation (NYSE:MCO) to his portfolio back in 2000, when the financial services company spun off from Dun & Bradstreet. As of Q4 2010, Warren Buffett held 28.42 million shares worth $754.14 million. Although reduced, the company’s stake in Moody’s remains significant. As […]

headline: MCO Q1 Deep Dive: AI Integration and Ratings Demand Drive Growth Amid Volatility
summary: Credit rating agency Moody's (NYSE:MCO) reported Q1 CY2026 results exceeding the market’s revenue expectations, with sales up 8.1% year on year to $2.08 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.33 per share was 2.6% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Moodys, Raises Price Target to $590
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Jason Haas   maintains Moodys (NYSE:MCO) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $560 to $590.
